title: Sort contacts & leads by location
excerpt: Has anyone created an app that allows you to create a view based on a location region? Example: I want to know all of the contacts within a 30 mile radius of San Francisco.

posts.author: Charlie_F (Charlie)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone created an app that allows you to create a view based on a location region? Example: I want to know all of the contacts within a 30 mile radius of San Francisco.
